buildCommand: rm -rf site/google site/dell site/partner && mkdir -p site/google site/dell site/partner && cp -R google/viewer/. site/google/ && cp -R dell/viewer/. site/dell/ && cp -R partner/viewer/. site/partner/ && rm -rf site/google/.vercel site/google/.env.local site/dell/.vercel site/dell/.env.local site/partner/.vercel site/partner/.env.local
